auth.subtitle: Email + password, or continue with a provider below.
auth.envHint: Auth env not detected. Copy .env.example → apps/web/.env.local and restart pnpm dev.

errors.invalidFileType: Only JPEG, PNG, GIF, or WebP images are allowed.

app.title: App
app.demoMode: Demo mode — no auth adapter. Configure Supabase or Better Auth (pnpm doctor).
app.billingDesc: Stripe when env is set (Open SaaS / ShipFast parity).

landing.subtitle: Auth, security, database, and deploy recipes are ready. You and your agent focus on the product — not re-picking a stack every session.
landing.footerMission: Built so everyone can ship ideas faster
landing.footerHint: Edit IDEA.md then run pnpm dev

features.authBody: Supabase or Better Auth. Switch with one env var.
features.dbBody: Drizzle + Postgres. Local, Neon, Railway, Supabase, or RDS — same code.
features.mailBody: Resend / console. S3 / local. Works in dev and production.
features.secBody: CSP headers, Zod, rate limits, ASVS L1 baseline — preconfigured.
features.deployBody: Vercel or Docker compose. Step-by-step guides included.
features.aiBody: AGENTS.md + IDEA.md + llms.txt. Agents know what to do.

steps.s1b: Who, problem, MVP — one file agents actually follow.
steps.s2b: Landing, auth, and /app shell are already wired.
steps.s3b: Ship features under /app. Stack stays fixed.
steps.s4b: supabase-full or portable-pg · Vercel or Docker.

checks.c4: Monorepo packages: auth, db, security, mail, storage

landing.pricingSub: Shipkit is free. This section is a template for your SaaS plans.
landing.faq1q: Do I need to know how to code?
landing.faq1a: Basic Terminal + an AI editor (Cursor, etc.) is enough. Follow the Vietnamese guide in the README.
landing.faq2q: Am I locked to Vercel or Supabase?
landing.faq2a: No. Use Supabase or any Postgres URL, deploy with Vercel or Docker.
landing.faq3q: How do I add my product features?
landing.faq3a: Edit IDEA.md, then ask your agent to implement the next MVP item under /app.
landing.faq4a: Stripe adapter is ready. Set STRIPE_SECRET_KEY + STRIPE_PRICE_ID and open /app/billing.

notes.title: Notes
notes.emptyState: No notes yet — add one above.
